message:
feat(export): add workspace_prefix to Issue for accurate ID alias resolution

Introduce `Issue::workspace_prefix` (serde-skipped) so that workspace
loading can record the exact prefix used during namespacing. The git
history alias builder now prefers this field over the heuristic
`lowercase(source_repo)-` fallback, fixing mismatches when the repo
name differs from the workspace prefix.

Also clean up stale history.json files when re-exporting pages with
history disabled, and add tests for all new behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -393,6 +393,7 @@ mod tests {
             comments: Vec::new(),
             dependencies: Vec::new(),
             source_repo: String::new(),
+            workspace_prefix: None,
             content_hash: None,
             external_ref: None,
         }
